ham.subject: Your Acme SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear {first_name},

We hope you’re enjoying your experience with Acme SaaS. Your subscription is set to expire on 2026-05-31. To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your plan by clicking the link below. If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

<URL>

Thank you for choosing Acme SaaS.

Best regards,

The Acme SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Ticket #98765 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,
